description: Black leather upper with brown overlays for comfort and protection Stitch detailing for greater style Embossed brand logo on the side of heel Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile and leather shoe lining Cushioned insole for in-step comfortRemovable footbed that can be replaced with an orthoticHigh traction outsole with TPR lugs in rectangular patternFlexible cleated traction outsole for greater grip
